enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request from 'Mr. Heavy Metal dude' asking his opinion on cookies. He explains he almost never buys cookies and prefers candy for his sweet tooth, but when he does eat cookies his favorites are soft chocolate chip and oatmeal cookies. He briefly speculates about the possible accidental origin of cookies.
enrichment.speaker: mixed

stances.position: almost never buys them, prefers candy like Nerds and Bottle Caps for sweet cravings
soft chocolate chip cookies are his top choice
liked them for a while, still enjoys them especially with nuts like macadamia
doesn't know it but humorously guesses cookies were an accidental sweet bread without yeast

transcript.text: Getting caught up on the video requests. This one's from Mr. Heavy Metal, dude.
Hi, Kyle. Next video request. What is your, um, opinion on cookies in general?
Also, what type of cookies do you like and eat?
Mine are chocolate chip, white chocolate, oatmeal, uh, raisin macadamia nut, and sugar cookies.
Thanks, and have a nice day. Interesting.
Cookies. What are my opinions on cookies?
And, um, I don't eat cookies. I never buy cookies. I almost, I never, never, never buy cookies.
If I buy cookies, I feel like I'm wasting my time. I'm wasting my money.
Um, although I don't mind eating cookies.
Um, back last summer, I didn't have any money, and I went over to the, uh, food place, you know?
What, a little food kitchen place, and they gave me some cookies, and I ate them. Yummy, yummy.
My mom likes to get cookies.
When I get a sweet tooth, I just eat candy. In fact, last night, I bought candy. I bought Nerds.
I bought Nerds and Bottle Caps, and, uh, that's what I have. Um, I don't do cookies.
But, when I do eat cookies, my favorite would be, uh, chocolate chip cookies.
I like the chocolate chip cookies that are soft, perpetually soft.
Um, I, when I grew up, my favorite, um, flavor was chocolate.
I don't think it's like that anymore, but, uh, but, yeah, cookies are good.
But, um, I like oatmeal cookies.
Um, for a while, those are my favorite.
Um, but I like what you're talking about.
Cookies go well with nuts, like macadamia nuts.
Um, yeah.
Uh, I don't know the history of cookies, though.
It wouldn't be surprising if it was, like, somebody who has had a sweet tooth,
And they're, you know, they normally make bread,
And then they forgot to add, like, the yeast,
And it was, like, sweet bread that doesn't rise.
And, oh, look, let's make it a cookie.
There you go.
Okay, so, peace out.
